name: system-wright
description: SystemWright — turn a vague goal into a reusable AI work system (Prompt, Context, Harness, Loop).

plugins.name: system-wright
plugins.description: Turns a vague goal into a reusable AI work system built from Prompt, Context, Harness, and Loop, with a plain-language brief, human-approval gates, and a small trial run. Use when productizing a recurring way of working with an agent; not for one-off rewrites, definitions, or ordinary code review.
